plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: 11 agent roles (8 user-facing + 3 internal): Launch Pad (Supervisor readiness), Supervisor v4 (parallel orchestration with Execute Manager), Orchestrator (plan), Code Reviewer (quality), Red Team Reviewer (adversarial audits), Product Owner (requirements), QA Strategist (risk-based test strategy), QA Executor (automated QA testing), plus /commit skill. Plan first and build correctly.
